Class BillController

java.lang.Object
com.finvision.controller.BillController
@Controller public class BillController extends Object
Handles HTTP endpoints for bill creation, editing, payment tracking, deletion, and snoozing on the Alerts & Notifications page.

All write endpoints require an authenticated principal and redirect to /alerts on success or failure.

  • Constructor Details

    • BillController

      public BillController()

  • Method Details

    • createBill

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills") public String createBill(@RequestParam String billName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="fixed") String amountType, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") double amount, @RequestParam(required=false) String estimatedAmount, @RequestParam String dueDate, @RequestParam(defaultValue="one-time") String frequency, @RequestParam(required=false) String category, @RequestParam(required=false) String notes, @RequestParam(required=false) List<Integer> reminderBefore, @RequestParam(required=false) List<Integer> overdueAfter, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Creates a new bill for the authenticated user.

      If the bill is one-time and the user has added a bill with the same name before, a suggestion to make it recurring monthly is shown.

      Parameters:
      billName - display name of the bill
      amountType - "fixed" or "variable"
      amount - the known/fixed dollar amount
      estimatedAmount - estimated amount (only used when type is variable)
      dueDate - due date in YYYY-MM-DD format
      frequency - "one-time", "weekly", "monthly", or "yearly"
      category - spending category label
      notes - optional free-text notes
      reminderBefore - days-before-due to send reminders
      overdueAfter - days-after-due to send overdue reminders
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts

    • editBill

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills/{id}/edit") public String editBill(@PathVariable String id, @RequestParam String billName, @RequestParam(defaultValue="fixed") String amountType, @RequestParam(defaultValue="0") double amount, @RequestParam(required=false) String estimatedAmount, @RequestParam String dueDate, @RequestParam(defaultValue="one-time") String frequency, @RequestParam(required=false) String category, @RequestParam(required=false) String notes, @RequestParam(required=false) List<Integer> reminderBefore, @RequestParam(required=false) List<Integer> overdueAfter, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Updates an existing bill owned by the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      id - the bill's MongoDB document ID
      billName - updated bill name
      amountType - "fixed" or "variable"
      amount - updated fixed amount
      estimatedAmount - updated estimated amount (variable bills only)
      dueDate - updated due date in YYYY-MM-DD format
      frequency - updated recurrence frequency
      category - updated spending category
      notes - updated notes
      reminderBefore - updated pre-due reminder days
      overdueAfter - updated overdue reminder days
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts

    • markPaid

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills/{id}/paid") public String markPaid(@PathVariable String id, @RequestParam(required=false) String paidAmount, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Marks a bill as paid and records the payment amount.
      Parameters:
      id - the bill's MongoDB document ID
      paidAmount - the amount actually paid (optional; uses bill amount if omitted)
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts

    • markUnpaid

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills/{id}/unpaid") public String markUnpaid(@PathVariable String id, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Reverts a bill's payment status back to unpaid.
      Parameters:
      id - the bill's MongoDB document ID
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts

    • deleteBill

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills/{id}/delete") public String deleteBill(@PathVariable String id, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Permanently deletes a bill owned by the authenticated user.
      Parameters:
      id - the bill's MongoDB document ID
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts

    • snoozeBill

      @PostMapping("/alerts/bills/{id}/snooze") public String snoozeBill(@PathVariable String id, @RequestParam(defaultValue="1") int snoozeDays, Principal principal, org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Snoozes a bill reminder by the specified number of days.
      Parameters:
      id - the bill's MongoDB document ID
      snoozeDays - number of days to snooze (defaults to 1)
      principal - the currently authenticated user
      redirectAttributes - flash attributes for the redirect response
      Returns:
      redirect to /alerts
